description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a fit build, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a cropped, short-sleeve t-shirt and camouflage-patterned shorts, suitable for casual or outdoor urban environments. Her footwear consists of sturdy, high-ankle combat boots, and she has a holster or pouch attached to her right thigh, suggesting a utilitarian or tactical style. Her hair is styled in a high ponytail with some loose strands framing her face. The figure's clothing fits closely, and her posture is upright and alert. The overall appearance is that of a confident, active individual prepared for urban or semi-urban activities.
description: A fit adult female pedestrian in a cropped t-shirt, camouflage shorts, and combat boots, with a high ponytail and a thigh holster. She stands upright with arms extended, ready for urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped t-shirt, camouflage shorts, and facial features, with arms extended and boots visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the holster on the right thigh, as well as the boot's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the t-shirt, shorts, and boots, with the ponytail and holster visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, chest, and holster, mirroring the left side but from the opposite angle.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped short-sleeve t-shirt, tactical shorts, thigh holster, and combat boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a high ponytail with loose strands
